body_txt: Super Serum with some unpleasant side effects, most commonly insanity . The Psycho Serum could be the result of questionable government programs Gone Horribly Wrong or freak lab accidents ; the user might be unaware of the side effects... or just doesn't care . Assuming, of course, that they actually consented to it in the first place . Consequences include , but are by no means limited to:  Since the idea is that it makes one more likely to be victorious (usually in battle) despite the above, it's closely associated with the concept of Race To The Bottom. A form of Drugs Are Bad . Not to be confused with Power-Upgrading Deformation , where the ugly appearance is the cause of the superpowers, not a side effect. See also Bottled Heroic Resolve , when this trope is applied systematically . See Chemically Induced Insanity for cases where causing insanity in the user was the whole point to begin with. Not to be confused with Drug-Crazed Savagery , which is when characters become aggressive and perform dangerous activities under the influence of drugs and alcohol. This item is available in the Trope Co. Catalog
